summary: An FPV drone struck a Ukrainian BUK air defense system near Bolshoy Sokolny Island, while Ukrainian pilots used distraction tactics to target Russian troops on horseback. Russian forces experienced multiple FPV drone strikes, including a soldier charging at a drone with a bayonet and another hiding behind a tree being hit by two drones at once. Iranian-backed militias launched a fiber-optic FPV drone attack on the US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport. NATO opened a new innovation range in Latvia for testing drones and counter-drone systems, and Ukraine and Britain agreed to develop advanced long-range maritime drones capable of open-ocean operations and multi-role combat functions.
